tools.name: deploy_ai_compliance_engine
tools.description: Deploy AI Compliance Engine — configure regulatory check framework (GDPR, HIPAA, EU AI Act, SOC 2), automated audit trail, risk scoring, evidence collection. Use when: deploy, configure compliance.

tools.name: evaluate_ai_compliance_engine
tools.description: Evaluate AI Compliance Engine — measure check accuracy, evidence quality, framework coverage, risk scoring calibration, false positive/negative rate. Use when: evaluate, audit compliance.

tools.name: tune_ai_compliance_engine
tools.description: Tune AI Compliance Engine — optimize check frequency, reduce false positives, calibrate risk scoring, configure evidence retention, framework-specific tuning. Use when: tune, optimize compliance.
